case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. ABM INDUSTRIES INC DBA BREWSTER CLEANERS & TAILORS et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT ABM INDUSTRIES INC DBA BREWSTER CLEANERS & TAILORS MANGIERI, ANNA DOES ONE THROUGH TEN INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-06-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-07-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-21-2007
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED MAR-31-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MANGIERI, ANNA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED MAR-31-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ABM INDUSTRIES INC DBA BREWSTER CLEANERS & TAILORS

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $277.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ABM INDUSTRIES INC DBA BREWSTER CLEANERS & TAILORS MANGIERI, ANNA
DECLARATION ANSON LOUIE FILED RE: COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORDS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY FILED RE: IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION MARK SCHICKENDANTZ FILED RE: EQUIPMENT VALUATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION ERNEST I. KNOWLES FILED RE: DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES ONE THROUGH TEN INCLUSIVE

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABM INDUSTRIES INC DBA BREWSTER CLEANERS & TAILORS MANGIERI, ANNA POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: FULTON 10HP OIL FIRED BOILER W/EXTRA LOW PRESSURE CONTROL, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $9,265.18 DAMAGES, $1,275.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $277.50 COSTS, $142.24 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,959.92, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-06-2007, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
